incident_examples.text: Yellow warning light is flashing on the machine and the pressure gauge seems to be reading low; need to run diagnostic and check the pressure sensor.
Machine is overheating with red fault light on solid; requires immediate emergency shutdown procedure.
Machine has been idle and green light is off; need to perform proper startup sequence to get it running.
Temperature sensor is showing above normal readings and yellow warning indicator is illuminated; check for high temperature alert.
Vibration sensor is detecting abnormal readings with yellow light flashing intermittently; investigate vibration anomaly.
Machine needs a diagnostic check; activate diagnostic mode to read all sensor values.
Yellow warning light is still on even though the issue was resolved; need to reset the warning indicator.
Yellow indicator is on and there may be debris in the intake; need to inspect and clean the intake cover.
Vibration sensor readings are high likely due to friction in moving parts; apply lubrication to reduce vibration.
Red fault light is solid on the machine; investigate the fault and identify the issue source.
Machine is showing low power warning and may need battery replacement; perform battery swap procedure.
Red light is on and machine is completely unresponsive; likely a blown fuse that needs replacement.
Light sensor is giving erratic and inconsistent readings; clean the sensor to fix detection issues.
Pressure sensor readings seem off and may need calibration check; run calibration verification procedure.
Temperature sensor readings are fluctuating unexpectedly; verify sensor accuracy and stability.
Machine surface has accumulated dirt that may be affecting operation; perform surface cleaning procedure.
Cables around the machine appear loose and tangled; organize cables with cable ties.
Safety inspection is required before maintenance work; perform safety equipment check.
Vibration sensor shows high readings due to loose bolts on the machine; tighten bolts to reduce vibration.
Panel on the machine is loose and rattling; tighten panel screws with screwdriver.
Debris has accumulated around the machine area; collect debris into container bin.
Light sensor is not properly detecting indicator light status; run light sensor diagnostic.
Bracket appears misaligned and causing vibration issues; adjust bracket alignment.
Pressure sensor shows drop due to blocked intake; clear the intake blockage.
Routine sensor verification is needed; perform all sensor health check.
Green indicator light is not illuminating after pressing start; verify green light function.
Yellow warning light is on but all sensors appear normal; acknowledge and clear false warning.
Red fault light was on but issue has been fixed; perform controlled restart after clearing fault.
Maintenance is scheduled and machine needs to be safely shut down; execute pre-maintenance shutdown.
Maintenance is complete and machine needs to be restarted; perform post-maintenance startup.
Vibration sensor is showing critical level readings; respond to excessive vibration emergency.
Temperature sensor reading is approaching the critical threshold; take action to prevent overheating.
Pressure sensor is giving intermittent readings that cut in and out; fix sensor connection issue.
Sensors appear to be covered with dust affecting readings; perform dust cleaning procedure.
Machine operation mode needs to be changed; execute mode selection procedure.
Multiple warning lights are flashing simultaneously; execute rapid shutdown protocol immediately.
Pressure sensor shows slow but steady pressure increase; monitor and check gradual pressure build.
Machine was shut down and is now cooling; monitor cooling period with temperature sensor.
Access panel needs to be opened for visual inspection; perform screwdriver maintenance task.
Machine components may have loosened; perform wrench tightening inspection of all bolts.
Intake cover is damaged and needs replacement; execute intake cover replacement procedure.
Machine sounds dry during operation; check lubricant levels and apply if needed.
Full diagnostic cycle is required; run complete blue button diagnostic cycle.
Multiple sensors are showing abnormal readings at the same time; respond to multi-sensor anomaly.
Start of shift and machine is idle; perform routine start of day check.
End of shift requires machine shutdown; perform end of day shutdown procedure.
Machine requires thorough deep cleaning; execute cleaning brush deep clean protocol.
Loose parts are scattered around machine area; collect parts using container bin.
Hazardous operation is about to be performed; check safety goggles requirement.
Cables need to be reorganized and bundled properly; perform cable tie organization.
Pressure sensor shows sudden significant drop in pressure; respond to pressure drop emergency.
Temperature sensor shows rapid temperature increase; respond to temperature spike immediately.
Vibration sensor is showing unusual vibration pattern; perform vibration pattern analysis.
All indicator lights need to be tested for proper function; run light indicator test.
Need to verify spare fuse inventory; perform spare fuse inventory check.
Battery backup status needs verification; check battery status and condition.
Emergency stop function needs to be tested; perform red button function test.
Machine start function needs to be verified; perform green button function test.
Warning reset function needs to be tested; perform yellow button function test.
Diagnostic function needs verification; perform blue button function test.
Pressure sensor threshold setting needs verification; check pressure threshold adjustment.
Temperature sensor threshold needs to be checked; verify temperature threshold setting.
Vibration sensor threshold verification is needed; check vibration threshold settings.
Both red fault and yellow warning lights are on simultaneously; respond to dual light warning.
Red fault light is blinking indicating intermittent fault condition; investigate blinking red light.
Yellow warning light is blinking on the machine; respond to blinking yellow light warning.
Green light is blinking instead of being solid after startup; investigate blinking green light.
No indicator lights are illuminated on the machine; investigate all lights off condition.
Sensor readings suggest possible disconnection; verify sensor connections.
Pressure sensor shows slow leak pattern; check intake cover seal condition.
Specific bolt appears to be causing vibration; check and tighten bolt vibration source.
Panel needs to be removed for internal inspection; perform panel inspection access procedure.
Bracket misalignment is suspected; perform bracket alignment check.
Scheduled lubrication is due; execute lubricant application schedule.
Scheduled cleaning is required; execute cleaning schedule procedure.
Weekly calibration check is due; perform weekly sensor calibration verification.
Monthly equipment check is required; conduct monthly equipment audit.
Unusual noise is coming from the machine; investigate noise using protocol.
Smoke or burning smell detected near machine; respond to smoke detection emergency.
Electrical sparking observed from machine; respond to sparking observation immediately.
One of the buttons appears stuck or unresponsive; investigate stuck button issue.
Light sensor is giving incorrect readings compared to actual light status; check for sensor obstruction.
Foreign object detected inside the machine; perform foreign object removal procedure.
Sensor readings are intermittent possibly due to loose cable; detect and fix loose cable.
Sensors may be affected by humidity; check humidity effect on sensor readings.
Machine is cold after extended shutdown period; perform cold start procedure.
Power fluctuation may have affected machine operation; respond to power fluctuation event.
Light pattern on machine indicates an error code; investigate error code pattern.
Machine failed to start when green button was pressed; perform startup failure recovery.
Machine is not responding to red emergency stop button; respond to shutdown failure.
Sensor is showing zero reading when it should have a value; perform sensor zero calibration.
Sensor is showing maximum value unexpectedly; investigate sensor maximum reading issue.
Tools were left at machine after maintenance; execute tool return protocol.
Safety goggles need cleaning before use; perform safety goggles cleaning.
Container bin is full and needs emptying; execute container bin emptying procedure.
Lubricant bottle appears to be running low; check lubricant bottle refill status.
Multiple sensors are showing no reading at all; respond to simultaneous sensor failure.
All buttons need function verification; perform routine button test cycle.
Full system verification is required; execute comprehensive system check.
Red light is flashing with alarm sound indicating emergency; execute emergency response protocol immediately.
